description: Reusable PressPilot OS workflows you can drop into any build.

workflows.name: Create Brand Kit From Logo or Description
workflows.summary: Start with a PressPilotSaaSInput payload and turn it into a PressPilot-ready brand kit + normalized context.
outputs: Color palette (7–9 colors, accessibility-safe variants included)
Core messaging (tagline, value prop, 3–5 key statements)
Structured JSON ready for theme.json and patterns
steps: Use module: analyze-brand-input (read brand + narrative cues)

workflows.name: Generate theme.json for WordPress Starter Theme
workflows.summary: Take the normalized brand kit JSON and output a production-ready theme.json for pp-starter.
inputs: Optional: theme presets (layout density, corner style)
outputs: Complete theme.json file for the WordPress block theme

workflows.name: Generate Three Design Variations
workflows.summary: Give users three visual directions based on one PressPilotNormalizedContext before they lock in a kit.
outputs: Preview assets or links for each variation
Metadata describing the differences for UI tabs
steps: Ensure PressPilotNormalizedContext is available (run apply_business_inputs if starting from payload)
Assemble three PressPilotVariationManifest objects with different palette/font/layout combos, including nav flags from context.modes
Return a PressPilotVariationSet for the preview UI

workflows.name: Restaurant Menu Generator
workflows.summary: Create a menu page and navigation item for restaurant/café mode using PressPilotSaaSInput.modes.restaurant.
inputs: Restaurant menu sections and PDF fields from PressPilotSaaSInput.modes.restaurant
steps: Ensure PressPilotNormalizedContext is available (run apply_business_inputs if needed)
Use module: build_pattern_set for menu blocks

workflows.name: WooCommerce Population
workflows.summary: Generate starter products, categories, and copy for ecommerce mode using PressPilotNormalizedContext.
steps: Ensure PressPilotNormalizedContext is available (run apply_business_inputs if needed)

workflows.name: Build WordPress Kit
workflows.summary: Assemble the selected variation, patterns, and content into a WordPress block theme folder plus kit manifest.
inputs: Mode-specific assets (menu blocks or WooCommerce seed data)
steps: Merge mode-specific assets into the theme folder structure

workflows.name: Export Final Kits
workflows.summary: Package the theme folder, static site, and kit manifest into downloadable artifacts for the dashboard.
steps: Compress static site folder into zip
Register download metadata for both downloads in the SaaS dashboard
